text: Uncertain: no decrement_hop_limit method found at lichen-ipv6/src/lib.rs:365 (now UdpHeader). Similar logic only in lichen-core/src/loadng.rs:with_decremented_hop_limit which returns None only on original==0 and test expects Some(0). Per RFC 8200 §3, forwarding must decrement then discard+send ICMP Time Exceeded if result==0. Recommendation: add ipv6::forwarding::decrement_hop_limit that returns Option and handles ICMP.
